stem: Marco opened a savings account at a credit union. The table shows the exponential relationship between the time t, in years, since Marco opened the account and the total amount n, in dollars, in the account. If Marco made no additional deposits or withdrawals, which of the following equations best represents the relationship between t and n?
rationale: Choice D is correct. The exponential model is n = a(1 + b)t. At t = 0, n = 800 = a. At t = 1, n = 804 = 800(1 + b), so 1 + b = 1.005 and b = 0.005. Therefore n = 800(1.005)t. The other choices misapply the model.
